description: Immersive VR educational experiences for select subjects, enabling virtual field trips, 3D visualizations of complex concepts, and interactive learning environments. Positions EduVerse as an innovative leader in EdTech.

phases.name: Foundation & Project Setup
phases.description: Install VR libraries, set up project structure, and create base VR infrastructure

subtasks.title: Install VR Dependencies
subtasks.description: Install @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, @react-three/xr, and three.js for WebXR support
acceptanceCriteria: All VR dependencies installed in package.json
TypeScript types available for all packages
No dependency conflicts with existing packages
subtasks.notes: Successfully added all VR dependencies to package.json: @react-three/fiber (v8.17.10), @react-three/drei (v9.114.3), @react-three/xr (v6.2.5), three (v0.171.0), and @types/three (v0.171.0) for TypeScript support. All dependencies are compatible with the existing Next.js project structure. Note: User will need to run 'yarn install' to install the actual packages.

subtasks.title: Create VR Component Directory Structure
subtasks.description: Set up organized folder structure for VR components, scenes, assets, and utilities
subtasks.notes: Successfully created organized VR folder structure with src/components/vr/ (canvas, scenes, hotspots, ui, experiences, fallback), src/lib/vr/ (hooks, utils), and src/types/vr.ts. Added comprehensive README.md files documenting structure and guidelines. All acceptance criteria met.

subtasks.title: Create VR Type Definitions
subtasks.description: Define TypeScript interfaces for VR experiences, scenes, hotspots, and tracking data
subtasks.notes:
Successfully created comprehensive TypeScript type definitions for VR experiences in src/types/vr.ts. Defined:
- Core VR types (VRMode, VRExperienceCategory, VRDifficultyLevel, HotspotType, VRSessionStatus)
- Localized content interfaces supporting Arabic & English
- VRHotspot base and 4 specialized types (InfoHotspot, NavigationHotspot, InteractiveHotspot, QuizHotspot)
- VRScene interface with camera settings, lighting config, and environment types
- VRExperience main container with metadata and learning objectives
- Subject-specific types (HistoricalSite, ScienceConcept, GeographicalLocation)
- VRSessionData for analytics tracking with hotspot interactions, scene visits, and quiz attempts
- VRUserProgress for aggregated user progress across all experiences
- VRCapabilities for WebXR device detection
- VRControlScheme for input handling
- VR UI component props interfaces
- Utility types for filtering, sorting, asset loading, and error handling

All types follow existing codebase patterns from database.ts and include comprehensive JSDoc comments. Ready for use in VR component development.

subtasks.title: Create VR Device Detection Hook
subtasks.description: Build useVRCapabilities hook to detect WebXR support and device capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: Identifies VR headset vs mobile vs desktop
Returns capability flags for conditional rendering

phases.name: Core VR Engine
phases.description: Build the core VR rendering system with scene management and user interaction

subtasks.title: Create VRCanvas Component
subtasks.description: Build the main VR canvas wrapper using React Three Fiber with XR support
acceptanceCriteria: Works in both VR and non-VR modes

subtasks.title: Create VRScene Component
subtasks.description: Build base VRScene component for loading and displaying 360-degree environments

subtasks.title: Create VRHotspot Component
subtasks.description: Build interactive hotspots for information points and navigation

subtasks.title: Create VRInfoPanel Component
subtasks.description: Build floating info panels for educational content in VR
acceptanceCriteria: Displays text and images in 3D space

subtasks.title: Create VRNavigation Component
subtasks.description: Build navigation system for moving between VR scenes and experiences

subtasks.title: Create VRControls Component
subtasks.description: Build unified control system for VR headsets, mouse, and touch

phases.name: Egyptian Historical Field Trips
phases.description: Create immersive virtual field trips to Egyptian historical sites

subtasks.title: Create Field Trip Hub Page
subtasks.description: Build the main entry page for Egyptian field trips at /vr-eduverse/field-trips
acceptanceCriteria: Lists all available field trip destinations

subtasks.title: Pyramids of Giza VR Experience
subtasks.description: Create immersive VR experience of the Pyramids of Giza with educational hotspots
acceptanceCriteria: Educational hotspots about construction, history, pharaohs

subtasks.title: Egyptian Museum VR Experience
subtasks.description: Create virtual tour of the Egyptian Museum with artifact hotspots

subtasks.title: Abu Simbel Temple VR Experience
subtasks.description: Create immersive VR experience of Abu Simbel temples
acceptanceCriteria: 360-degree views of temple facade and interior

subtasks.title: Create 360 Assets & Placeholder Images
subtasks.description: Source or create placeholder 360-degree images for field trips
acceptanceCriteria: High-quality placeholder images for each location

phases.name: Science 3D Visualizations
phases.description: Create interactive 3D visualizations for science concepts

subtasks.title: Create Science Hub Page
subtasks.description: Build the main entry page for science visualizations at /vr-eduverse/science
acceptanceCriteria: Categorized by topic (biology, chemistry, physics, astronomy)

subtasks.title: Solar System 3D Visualization
subtasks.description: Create interactive 3D model of the solar system
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 planets with accurate relative sizes

subtasks.title: Human Cell 3D Visualization
subtasks.description: Create interactive 3D model of a plant/animal cell

subtasks.title: Atom & Molecule 3D Visualization
subtasks.description: Create interactive 3D model of atomic and molecular structures

subtasks.title: Create 3D Models & Assets
subtasks.description: Create or source 3D models for science visualizations

phases.name: Geography VR Module
phases.description: Create VR experiences for geography education as the third subject

subtasks.title: Create Geography Hub Page
subtasks.description: Build the main entry page for geography VR at /vr-eduverse/geography

subtasks.title: Nile River VR Experience
subtasks.description: Create VR journey along the Nile River showing geography and ecosystems

subtasks.title: Sinai Peninsula VR Experience
subtasks.description: Create VR exploration of Sinai's diverse geography

subtasks.title: Egyptian Ecosystems Overview
subtasks.description: Create VR experience showcasing Egypt's diverse ecosystems
acceptanceCriteria: Desert, oasis, Nile valley, Mediterranean coast

phases.name: Performance Tracking
phases.description: Build analytics and progress tracking for VR sessions

subtasks.title: Create VR Session Tracking Types
subtasks.description: Define database schema and types for VR session tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Tracks time spent, hotspots viewed, scenes visited
Links to user and experience IDs

subtasks.title: Create VR Analytics API Routes
subtasks.description: Build API endpoints for tracking VR session data

subtasks.title: Create useVRAnalytics Hook
subtasks.description: Build hook for tracking user interactions in VR experiences
acceptanceCriteria: Batches events for efficient API calls

subtasks.title: Create VR Progress Dashboard
subtasks.description: Build dashboard component showing VR learning progress

phases.name: 2D Fallback Mode
phases.description: Create fallback experience for browsers without VR support

subtasks.title: Create 2D Panorama Viewer
subtasks.description: Build fallback 360 image viewer using CSS/Canvas for non-WebGL browsers

subtasks.title: Create 2D Gallery Mode
subtasks.description: Build static image gallery as ultimate fallback
acceptanceCriteria: Grid of key images from each scene

subtasks.title: Create Capability-Based Rendering
subtasks.description: Implement automatic switching between VR, 3D, and 2D modes

subtasks.title: Create 2D Science Visualizations
subtasks.description: Build animated 2D alternatives for 3D science content

phases.name: Integration & Polish
phases.description: Integrate VR experiences with main platform and polish UI

subtasks.title: Update VR Eduverse Landing Page
subtasks.description: Enhance existing /vr-eduverse page with links to actual experiences
acceptanceCriteria: Quick access to all VR experiences

subtasks.title: Add VR to Navigation
subtasks.description: Update site navigation to include VR experiences

subtasks.title: Create VR Loading States
subtasks.description: Build loading indicators and progress for VR asset loading

subtasks.title: Add VR Onboarding Tutorial
subtasks.description: Create first-time user tutorial for VR controls

subtasks.title: Cross-Browser Testing
subtasks.description: Test VR experiences across browsers and devices
acceptanceCriteria: Works in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge

subtasks.title: Performance Optimization
subtasks.description: Optimize VR rendering for smooth performance

technicalDecisions.decision: Use React Three Fiber with @react-three/xr for VR
technicalDecisions.rationale: Best React integration for WebXR, large ecosystem, good TypeScript support

technicalDecisions.decision: 360-degree images for field trips, 3D models for science
technicalDecisions.rationale: 360 images are more immersive for locations, 3D models allow interaction for concepts
Ensures all users can access content regardless of device capabilities
VR requires browser APIs not available during SSR, use dynamic imports
